channel.title: AlignAI Prompt Hub - New Prompts
channel.description: Field-tested AI prompts for small business. Verified monthly.

item.title: AI Search Readiness Audit & Fix Plan
item.description: Build an agentic workflow that ingests your homepage HTML, scores AI-search readiness on a 100-point rubric, classifies your site Hot/Warm/Cold for answer-engine citation, and drafts the exact fixes — JSON-LD blocks, rewritten paragraphs, robots.txt additions — ready to paste in.

item.title: Generate FAQs Your Customers Actually Search For
item.description: Generate 10 FAQ Q&A pairs phrased the way real customers type into ChatGPT, Google and voice search — not the way your marketing team would write them. Output is ready to drop into FAQPage JSON-LD and your visible FAQ section.

item.title: Rewrite Your Homepage Hero for AI Answer Engines
item.description: Restructure your homepage's first 50 words so AI answer engines (ChatGPT Search, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews) can lift a clean, citation-ready answer to the question your customers actually type. Outputs three voiced versions plus reasoning so you can pick the one that matches your brand.

item.title: Find the Sentence AI Engines Will Quote From Your Page
item.description: Identify the single sentence on any page most likely to be lifted as a featured snippet or pulled into an AI Overview citation — or, if no sentence qualifies, write the one you should add and tell you exactly where it belongs.

item.title: Write a How-To Guide AI Engines Will Cite
item.description: Generate a complete how-to / tutorial article structured exactly the way Google AI Overviews, ChatGPT Search, and Perplexity reward — answer-first intro, numbered atomic steps with image cues, prerequisites, time estimate, and a paste-ready HowTo JSON-LD block. Optimized for citation, not just ranking.

item.title: Find Duplicate Schema Errors Killing Rich Results
item.description: Scan a page for the #1 cause of Rich Results validation failures: the same data expressed in BOTH visible microdata (itemscope/itemtype/itemprop) AND JSON-LD. Returns a clear list of which microdata attributes to remove from the visible HTML so JSON-LD can stand alone — plus a check for orphaned aggregateRating, broken @id references, and 5 other common Rich Results killers.

item.title: Diagnose Why AI Engines Aren't Citing You
item.description: You're ranking on Google but ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google AI Overviews never mention you. This agentic workflow walks the four-layer diagnostic — crawl access, schema coverage, content extractability, and entity authority — and tells you which layer is the bottleneck plus the next 3 actions to unblock it. Designed for businesses that already have basic SEO in place.

item.title: See Which Competitors AI Engines Cite Instead of You
item.description: Run a structured query set across ChatGPT Search, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews, and Claude to discover which 3–5 competitors are getting cited for the queries you want to own — and what specifically those competitors are doing on their pages that you're not. Outputs a competitor-by-citation-pattern matrix plus a prioritized gap list.

item.title: AI-Powered Lead Qualification & Scoring
item.description: Build an agentic workflow that ingests inbound leads from a CRM export, scores them against your ICP, drafts personalized outreach sequences, and flags high-priority leads for immediate follow-up.

item.title: CMO Page Engagement Analyzer
item.description: Analyze any web page through a CMO lens — messaging clarity, positioning strength, engagement hooks, content hierarchy, tagline effectiveness, and audience-market fit. Goes beyond design and CRO to evaluate whether the page tells the right story to the right people with the right energy. Outputs a rewritten messaging framework and engagement optimization plan.

item.title: Multi-Platform Social Media Calendar
item.description: Create a 30-day social media content calendar across Instagram, LinkedIn, X, and TikTok with post types, hooks, hashtags, and optimal posting times tailored to your industry.

item.title: SEO Content Brief Generator
item.description: Generate a structured SEO content brief for a blog post targeting a specific keyword, including title options, meta description, H2 outline, and internal linking suggestions.

item.title: Inventory Demand Forecasting Assistant
item.description: Build an agentic workflow that analyzes 12 months of sales data, seasonal patterns, and supplier lead times to generate a rolling 90-day demand forecast with reorder alerts and safety stock recommendations.

item.title: Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) Generator
item.description: Generate a complete SOP document for any repeatable business process — from employee onboarding to warehouse receiving — in a consistent, numbered-step format with role assignments and exception handling.

item.title: Vendor Negotiation Email Sequence
item.description: Draft a 3-email negotiation sequence for renewing a vendor contract, including an opening anchor, a concession strategy, and a walk-away alternative, all adapted to your specific contract terms.

item.title: Loyalty Program Design & Comms Builder
item.description: Design a complete customer loyalty program including tier structure, point mechanics, reward catalog, and a full communication sequence (launch email, milestone triggers, win-back flows) tailored to your average order value and customer lifecycle.

item.title: Review Response Template Engine
item.description: Generate professional, empathetic responses to Google/Yelp reviews — both positive and negative — that match your brand voice and include a specific call-to-action.

item.title: Support Ticket Triage & Response Drafter
item.description: Classify incoming support tickets by urgency and category, then draft context-aware first responses using your knowledge base and past resolution patterns as few-shot examples.

item.title: 13-Week Cash Flow Forecast Builder
item.description: Generate a week-by-week 13-week cash flow forecast template from your current bank balance, expected receivables, and fixed/variable expenses.

item.title: Dynamic Pricing Strategy Modeler
item.description: Build a pricing analysis workflow that ingests your product catalog, cost structure, competitor pricing, and demand elasticity estimates to recommend optimal price points, bundling strategies, and promotional discount guardrails.

item.title: SWOT-to-Strategy Action Plan
item.description: Conduct a structured SWOT analysis for your business, then use chain-of-thought reasoning to convert each finding into a prioritized 90-day action plan with owners, KPIs, and dependencies.

item.title: 90-Day Onboarding Program Builder
item.description: Create a structured 90-day onboarding plan broken into Week 1 (orientation), Weeks 2-4 (role ramp), and Months 2-3 (independence milestones) with check-in schedules, training resources, and manager talking points.

item.title: Job Description & Posting Generator
item.description: Generate a compelling, inclusive job description with role summary, responsibilities, requirements (must-have vs. nice-to-have), compensation range framing, and a culture section — optimized for job board SEO.

item.title: Performance Review Cycle Automation
item.description: Design an end-to-end performance review workflow: self-assessment prompts, manager evaluation templates, 360-feedback question sets, calibration discussion guides, and development plan generators — all customized to your company values and competency framework.

item.title: Brand Identity System Builder
item.description: Build a complete brand identity system from scratch — color palette with accessibility ratios, typography scale, voice and tone guidelines, visual style rules, and a one-page brand cheat sheet your team can actually use.

item.title: Design Critique Partner
item.description: Get a professional design critique on any visual asset — website, logo, pitch deck, social graphics, packaging, or email template. Evaluates hierarchy, typography, color usage, spacing, brand consistency, and user experience. Outputs a prioritized fix list, not just opinions.

item.title: Logo Concept Brief Generator
item.description: Generate a detailed creative brief for a logo design, including style direction, color psychology rationale, typography recommendations, and 5 distinct concept descriptions ready to hand to a designer or feed into an AI image tool.

item.title: Multi-Channel Campaign Brief Generator
item.description: Generate a complete visual campaign brief spanning ads, email, landing page, and social — all from a single creative direction. Outputs design specs, copy frameworks, asset dimensions, and a production checklist so your designer (or AI tool) can execute without guessing.

item.title: Pitch Deck Visual Direction Guide
item.description: Generate a complete visual direction document for a pitch deck — slide-by-slide layout recommendations, data visualization styles, image direction, color usage rules, and a consistent visual system that makes a 15-slide deck look like it was designed by a professional agency.

item.title: Product Mockup Prompt Generator
item.description: Generate detailed image prompts for product photography mockups — lifestyle shots, flat lays, packaging renders, and hero images optimized for e-commerce listings, social media, and marketing materials.

item.title: Social Media Graphics Brief Generator
item.description: Generate platform-specific graphic design briefs for Instagram, LinkedIn, X, and TikTok — with exact dimensions, text placement guidelines, visual direction, and ready-to-use prompts for Canva AI or image generation tools.

item.title: Website Accessibility Audit
item.description: Audit your website or app for accessibility issues — WCAG 2.1 compliance, screen reader compatibility, keyboard navigation, color contrast, form usability, and alt text. Outputs a categorized issue list with severity, fix instructions, and a remediation priority roadmap. Helps avoid lawsuits and reach more customers.

item.title: Explainer Video Storyboard Builder
item.description: Create a complete storyboard for a 60-90 second explainer video — scene-by-scene script, visual descriptions, motion/animation notes, voiceover timing, and music direction. Optimized for product demos, service overviews, and investor pitches.

item.title: Podcast Episode Outline & Show Notes Generator
item.description: Generate a complete podcast episode plan — topic angle, cold open hook, segment breakdown with timestamps, interview questions (if guest episode), show notes with SEO keywords, social media clips to cut, and a newsletter recap draft. One prompt produces your entire episode production workflow.

item.title: Short-Form Video Script & Shot List
item.description: Generate a complete 30-60 second video script with shot-by-shot breakdown, hook options, call-to-action variants, and platform-specific formatting for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts.

item.title: UGC-Style Ad Script Generator
item.description: Generate authentic-sounding user-generated content ad scripts for social media — including the "real person" hook, product demo moment, objection handling, and CTA. Formatted for creators to film on their phone with zero production budget.

item.title: YouTube Thumbnail Concept Generator
item.description: Generate 5 high-click-rate thumbnail concepts for a YouTube video, including text overlay (max 4 words), facial expression direction, color blocking strategy, and AI image prompts for background generation.

item.title: Customer Case Study Writer
item.description: Generate a complete customer case study from raw interview notes or survey responses — including the narrative arc, pull quotes, data callouts, visual layout suggestions, and versions optimized for website, PDF, and sales deck formats.

item.title: Media Pitch Email Sequence
item.description: Generate a 3-email pitch sequence for reaching journalists, podcasters, and bloggers — including the initial pitch, a follow-up with a different angle, and a final value-add touch. Each email is personalized to the outlet type.

item.title: Press Release Generator
item.description: Generate a complete, AP-style press release for product launches, company milestones, partnerships, or events — including headline, subheadline, dateline, body with quotes, boilerplate, and media contact block.

item.title: Testimonial Request Email Sequence
item.description: Generate a 2-email sequence to request customer testimonials — a warm initial ask and a gentle follow-up — plus a structured questionnaire that guides customers to give specific, usable testimonials instead of generic "great product" responses.

item.title: Freelancer & Contractor Agreement Generator
item.description: Generate a comprehensive independent contractor agreement covering scope of work, payment terms, intellectual property ownership, confidentiality, termination clauses, and liability limitations — written in plain English that both parties can actually understand.

item.title: Non-Disclosure Agreement (NDA) Generator
item.description: Generate a mutual or one-way NDA for business discussions, partnerships, hiring, or vendor relationships — with clear definitions of confidential information, exclusions, obligations, term, and remedies.

item.title: Privacy Policy Generator
item.description: Generate a GDPR and CCPA-aware privacy policy for your website or app — covering data collection, usage, sharing, cookies, user rights, and contact information. Structured by regulation requirement so nothing is missed.

item.title: Terms of Service Generator
item.description: Generate comprehensive Terms of Service for a website, SaaS product, or e-commerce store — covering acceptable use, payment terms, refund policy, intellectual property, liability limitations, and dispute resolution.

item.title: Customer Churn Early Warning System
item.description: Analyze your customer data to identify churn risk patterns, build an early warning checklist, and create targeted save campaigns for at-risk accounts. Works with CRM exports, payment data, or even a spreadsheet of customer activity.

item.title: KPI Dashboard Blueprint
item.description: Generate a complete KPI dashboard specification from your business goals — what to track, how to measure it, target ranges, and which tools to pull data from. Perfect for setting up Google Sheets, Looker Studio, or any BI tool.

item.title: Revenue Forecasting Model Builder
item.description: Build a multi-scenario revenue forecast from your historical data — baseline, optimistic, and conservative — with monthly projections, assumption documentation, and sensitivity analysis. Output is investor-ready or usable for internal planning.

item.title: Survey & Feedback Insight Extractor
item.description: Turn a pile of survey responses, NPS comments, support tickets, or review feedback into a structured insights report with themes, sentiment breakdown, priority actions, and quotable highlights. Works with any unstructured text feedback.

item.title: Abandoned Cart Email Recovery Sequence
item.description: Generate a 3-email abandoned cart recovery sequence with escalating urgency — a gentle reminder, a value reinforcement with social proof, and a final offer with scarcity. Each email includes subject line, preview text, body copy, and CTA.
